summary:
Therapeutic levels of vedolizumab are unlikely to appear in breast milk because its structure and mechanism resemble other large-molecular-weight biologic antibodies known to have negligible presence in lactation. Evidence supports that such agents pass into breast milk only at trace amounts, insufficient to achieve therapeutic effects in infants. 

The summary must strictly follow this format:

Final Answer: [summary here]

Final Answer: Therapeutic levels of vedolizumab areunlikely to appear in breast milk because its structure and mechanism resemble other large-molecular-weight biologic antibodies known to have negligible presence in lactation. Evidence supports that such agents pass into breast milk only at trace amounts, insufficient to achieve therapeutic effects in infants.
